name: Camilla
bio:
Vampire of the Vampire Clan, who has lived in seclusion in human society for years. He heals the wounded with Blood Magic, devoting himself to protection and support, and seeking balance between power and compassion.

Role: Buff Acceleration
Specialty: A backline Support-type hero with powerful buff effects and group healing; enhances the team's ability to apply Bleed.

skillSlots.name: Blood Healing
skillSlots.description: Heals ally with lowest HP for 220% ATK as HP.

skillSlots.name: Crimson Dance
skillSlots.description: Restores HP equal to 150% ATK for 4 allies with lowest HP.
